title: Review the current code changes (staged, unstaged, and untracked files) and provide prioritized findings.
summary_text: {"findings":[{"title":"[P1] Fix recipe asset paths before loading registry data","body":"When `fugue-execute` is invoked with `--recipe`, `loadRecipe()` reads from `../../../rules/dev-recipes.json`. From `assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib`, that resolves to `assets/skills/rules/dev-recipes.json`, not the checked-in `assets/rules/dev-recipes.json`, so every explicit recipe currently returns `null` and silently falls back to the default lane matrix/review threshold. The same off-by-one base also makes the power-word/template lookups point at non-existent `assets/skills/assets/...` paths.","confidence_score":0.99,"priority":1,"code_location":{"absolute_file_path":"/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/recipe-loader.mjs","line_range":{"start":13,"end":15}}},{"title":"[P1] Guard failed coder runs so the REPL stays alive","body":"If a coder task fails, `codex exec` will return non-zero here and `set -e` will terminate the shell before `EXIT_CODE=$?` runs. That means the pane never prints the error banner or returns to `CANON_READY`, so the polling loop in `assets/skills/canon/SKILL.md` can hang forever waiting for a prompt that will never reappear.","confidence_score":0.98,"priority":1,"code_location":{"absolute_file_path":"/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-build-codex.sh","line_range":{"start":30,"end":31}}},{"title":"[P1] Keep tester REPL alive after non-zero Codex runs","body":"The tester pane has the same `set -e` regression on both the remote `ssh` path and the local fallback: any non-zero exit from Codex or SSH exits the whole loop before `EXIT_CODE=$?` executes. In practice a single failing test-generation run kills the tester worker and breaks the `CANON_READY` polling contract for the Canon workflow.","confidence_score":0.98,"priority":1,"code_location":{"absolute_file_path":"/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-build-mini.sh","line_range":{"start":40,"end":49}}},{"title":"[P2] Escape tester task text before embedding it in ssh","body":"When the task text contains a single quote — for example an English prompt like `it's flaky` or a copied shell snippet — this interpolated SSH command becomes invalid on the remote shell (`... exec 'it's flaky'`). Those tasks fail before Codex even starts, so the task text needs shell escaping or stdin transport instead of raw single-quoting.","confidence_score":0.95,"priority":2,"code_location":{"absolute_file_path":"/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-build-mini.sh","line_range":{"start":42,"end":44}}}],"overall_correctness":"patch is incorrect","overall_explanation":"The patch introduces functional regressions in two core execution paths: explicit recipe selection cannot load its registry, and both Canon worker panes now die on the first failing Codex run. The tester pane also mishandles prompts containing apostrophes.","overall_confidence_score":0.97}
